claims.text: Ornn.com is the public site for Ornn AI's compute-market infrastructure business, not a parked domain.
Ornn's visible product stack includes Ornn Data for GPU pricing benchmarks and Ornn Compute for access to GPU capacity.
Ornn announced a $5.7 million seed round on October 28, 2025 led by Crucible Ventures and Vine Ventures.
Ornn announced on April 2, 2026 that OCPI was available on Bloomberg Terminal and had six months as a live index.
ICE and Ornn announced plans on May 19, 2026 to launch U.S. dollar-denominated, cash-settled GPU compute futures based on OCPI, subject to regulatory approval.
a16z crypto said it led a $33 million seed round in Ornn in June 2026.
Ornn says OCPI is built from executed or cleared transactions rather than listings, offers, surveys, or scraped list prices.
Ornn's April 2026 release said more than 400 data-center operators, investors, and AI companies accessed the Ornn platform to track GPU pricing.
Ornn launched Ornn Token Price Indices on June 16, 2026 for realized inference-token costs, initially including Anthropic and OpenAI indices.
NVIDIA reported fiscal 2026 revenue of $215.9 billion, up 65%, with Data Center revenue up 68%.
Microsoft said in FY2026 Q2 and Q3 that roughly two-thirds of capex was for short-lived assets, primarily GPUs and CPUs.
Meta guided 2026 capital expenditures including finance-lease principal payments to $125 billion to $145 billion in Q1 2026 results.
Amazon said trailing-twelve-month free cash flow fell to $1.2 billion, driven primarily by a year-over-year increase in property and equipment purchases that primarily reflected AI investments.
CME Group and Silicon Data announced on May 12, 2026 plans to launch compute futures later in 2026, pending regulatory review.
CFTC rules allow designated contract markets to list contracts by self-certification or by requesting approval, with regulated entities expected to ensure continuing compliance.
